title: Ljubljana 2026 Wordnets
name: LJW
tagline: Japanese and Slovene wordnets for the Ljubljana 2026 talks

main.description: Main lexical database — English, Japanese, and Slovene synsets linked through the Open Multilingual Wordnet.

provenance.description: Provenance records tracing every data point back to its source wordnet.

about.intro: Wordnets used in the Ljubljana 2026 talks by Francis Bond. Includes English (Open English WordNet), the Japanese WordNet (日本語ワードネット), and the Open Slovene Wordnet, all linked through the Open Multilingual Wordnet.
about.citation: If you use these wordnets, please cite the individual wordnet papers listed on the talk pages.

publications: Francis Bond and Ryan Foster (2013). Linking and extending an open multilingual wordnet. In Proceedings of ACL 2013.
Francis Bond and Christiane Fellbaum (2024). The Open Multilingual Wordnet 2.0. In Proceedings of GWC 2024.
